name: Almost Golf WV
address: 482 Point Marion Rd Unit B3, Morgantown, WV 26508
about: Almost Golf WV is an indoor golf simulator venue in Morgantown, West Virginia, offering year-round golf experiences. The facility is equipped with premium TrackMan technology powered by radar launch monitors, allowing players to practice and play on world-class courses regardless of weather conditions. Almost Golf WV offers both casual and full membership options, designed for golfers of all skill levels looking for a convenient and high-quality simulator experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Year-round access to golf regardless of weather conditions
Freedom to practice, play, or entertain with a variety of membership options
